_note: CRC has ONLY a default hostpath StorageClass; DCS_SC_FILE is set to it so envsubst yields a valid class. Two CRC-specific notes: (1) the RWX File PVC binds because hostpath allows it here; (2) CRC's portless-test session SCC is RunAsAny, so it does NOT auto-assign an fsGroup — the mounted volume stays root-owned and the non-root container can't write. Standard OpenShift restricted-v2 (as on real DCS) auto-assigns an in-range fsGroup and the volume is group-writable with no manifest change. To reproduce that here, the apply step patches fsGroup explicitly. The workshop manifest is intentionally left portable (no hardcoded fsGroup).

steps.run: DCS_SC_FILE=crc-csi-hostpath-provisioner envsubst < pvc-file.yaml | oc apply -f - && envsubst < hello-dcs-with-volume.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=merge -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"securityContext":{"fsGroup":1000700000}}}}}' && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc delete pod -l app=hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
